goal: Production-grade AI video creation platform — direct InVideo.io competitor

strategic_direction.summary: Full-stack scale-ready architecture. Phase 1 personal use (free stack). Phase 2 monetization when quality matches InVideo. Zero-rewrite upgrade path.
strategic_direction.monetization_plan: Self-use first. Stripe subscription tiers in Phase 2.
strategic_direction.philosophy: Free to start, scale by swapping one function at a time. No rewrites.

target_stack.frontend: Next.js 15 (App Router) — deployed on Cloudflare Pages
target_stack.auth: Clerk — free tier, Google + email, user management dashboard
target_stack.database: Supabase — free tier Postgres, stores users, projects, video library, render jobs — LIVE Step 4
target_stack.storage: Cloudflare R2 — free 10GB, stores rendered MP4s and generated images — LIVE Step 4
target_stack.ai_script: Groq — free, llama-3.3-70b-versatile, LIVE — key server-side only
target_stack.ai_tts: 3-tier voice — LIVE Step 7. Tier 1: Piper TTS (free, self-hosted). Tier 2: ElevenLabs + PlayHT fallback. Tier 3: BYOK key in UI per-render.
target_stack.ai_images: 4-engine image system — LIVE. Pollinations (free, default) → FLUX Schnell (Replicate, ~$0.003/img) → FLUX Dev (Replicate, ~$0.025/img) → Ideogram v2 (free tier). All gracefully fall back to Pollinations if key not set. User selects engine per-render in new-project UI.
target_stack.video_render: Remotion — server-side React+ffmpeg renderer, LIVE — real MP4s via /api/render/run. Ken Burns + captions + audio.
target_stack.render_queue: Cloudflare Queues → Cloudflare Worker — LIVE Step 5. Async job dispatch. Falls back to sync if not configured.
target_stack.templates: 8 templates — LIVE Step 8. Each template controls the full generation pipeline.

upgrade_path.ElevenLabs \u2192 PlayHT: set PLAYHT_API_KEY + PLAYHT_USER_ID — auto-fallback already wired
upgrade_path.Any TTS \u2192 user BYOK: user enters key in new-project UI — already live
upgrade_path.Remotion OSS \u2192 Remotion Lambda: swap lib/services/video.ts renderFinalVideoRemotion() — zero architecture change
upgrade_path.Add new template: add entry to lib/templates.ts TEMPLATES array — zero other changes

[x] Step 2: Groq script generation (port from current app.js) — COMPLETE
[x] Step 3: Remotion video renderer (real server-side MP4s) — COMPLETE
[x] Step 4: Supabase schema + R2 storage + project library — COMPLETE
[x] Step 5: Cloudflare Queue for async render dispatch — COMPLETE
[ ] Step 6: Stripe subscription tiers — DEFERRED (no paying users yet, zero cost build)
[x] Step 7: 3-tier voice architecture (Piper + ElevenLabs + PlayHT + BYOK) — COMPLETE
[x] Step 8: Custom templates + brand kits — COMPLETE

files_modified: lib/templates.ts — NEW. ViralTemplate interface. 8 templates: TikTok Story, Documentary, True Crime, History Channel, AI News, Reddit Story, Motivation, Business Explainer, Faceless YouTube. Each template defines: tone, systemPersona, beats[], beatNotes{}, visualStyle, cameraVocabulary, pacingNote, lightingNote, defaultFormat, defaultDuration, defaultVoice, captionStyle, sceneCountOverride. Helper functions: getTemplate(), getDefaultTemplate(), getTemplatesByCategory(), buildSystemPersona(), buildBeatInstructions().

app/api/generate/route.ts — Updated. GenerateRequest now accepts optional templateId. buildPrompt() is fully template-aware: injects systemPersona, template.tone, template.visualStyle, template.cameraVocabulary, template.lightingNote, and per-beat director notes from buildBeatInstructions(). Dynamic story_arc JSON schema keys generated from template.beats. sceneCount() respects template.sceneCountOverride. Groq system message uses buildSystemPersona(template). Backwards-compatible — falls back to TikTok Story template when templateId is absent. templateId echoed back in GenerateResponse.

app/(app)/new-project/page.tsx — Updated. Template selector card added as first card (above Niche). 8 template buttons with emoji, label, description. Selecting a template auto-fills format, duration, voice, captionStyle, tone. Template details strip shows format/duration/beats/caption/tone preview. Preview summary shows Template + Topic instead of Niche + Tone. handleGenerate() forwards templateId to /api/generate.

template_catalog.tiktok-story: 3 scenes, 9:16, 30s, punchy, TikTok native, snap-zoom camera
template_catalog.history-channel: 7 beats, 16:9, 90s, epic painterly style, chiaroscuro lighting
template_catalog.motivation: 7 beats, 9:16, 60s, high-energy aspirational, golden hour lighting
template_catalog.faceless-youtube: documentary beats, 16:9, 90s, cinematic B-roll, research-heavy narration

architecture.template_controls: Every template controls: script tone, system persona, beat sequence, per-beat director notes, visual style, camera vocabulary, pacing, lighting, format, duration, voice, captions.
architecture.backwards_compat: templateId is optional in GenerateRequest. Falls back to tiktok-story. All existing API callers unaffected.
architecture.extensibility: New templates added by appending to TEMPLATES array in lib/templates.ts. Zero other changes required.

current_status: Image engine upgrade complete. 4 providers selectable per-render: Pollinations (free default), FLUX Schnell, FLUX Dev, Ideogram v2. All fall back gracefully. REPLICATE_API_TOKEN + IDEOGRAM_API_KEY documented in .env.local.example. Next: Step 9 (Bulk generation) or set REPLICATE_API_TOKEN and validate quality.

legacy_systems_status.callAPI_groq_script: PORTED — /api/generate route, server-side, key never exposed
legacy_systems_status.story_arc_7_beat_schema: PORTED — full schema in Groq prompt, returned in JSON response. Templates extend with custom beat sequences.
legacy_systems_status.character_memory_schema: PORTED — characters array with locked visual_identity. Stored in projects.characters_json (Step 4).
legacy_systems_status.buildTimeline_getCameraMove_parseCameraM: PORTED — remotion/kenburns.ts, getKenBurnsFrame() + parseCameraMovement(). Templates inject vocabulary into prompts.
legacy_systems_status.renderCharacters_character_memory: COMPLETE — character visual_identity in image_prompts + persisted in Supabase
legacy_systems_status.caption_engine: PORTED — remotion/captions.tsx, TikTok v2 + Reels Bold, word-timed segments. Template-controlled via captionStyle.
legacy_systems_status.platform_publishing: TO REBUILD in Step 10 → server-side token storage in Supabase

next_priorities: IMMEDIATE — Set REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in .env.local, select FLUX Schnell, render test videos across templates. Validate quality jump.
Step 9: Bulk generation dashboard — generate 5-10 videos from one topic + template
Step 6: Stripe — when first paying user arrives
last_run: Image engine upgrade — lib/services/image.ts rewritten with 4 providers (Pollinations, FLUX Schnell/Dev via Replicate, Ideogram v2). All graceful fallback to Pollinations if key missing. render/run/route.ts now calls generateImage() from service layer — buildPollinationsUrl() removed. new-project page image engine select upgraded to 4 options with quality/cost labels and signup links. .env.local.example updated with REPLICATE_API_TOKEN + IDEOGRAM_API_KEY.

files_to_change: lib/services/image.ts — add generateImageFluxReplicate() + generateImageIdeogram(). generateImage() routes by imageEngine param.
app/api/render/run/route.ts — replace buildPollinationsUrl() inline call with generateImage() from service layer. Pass imageEngine from body.
app/(app)/new-project/page.tsx — upgrade image engine select: 4 options with quality tier + cost label + free badge.
.env.local.example — document REPLICATE_API_TOKEN and IDEOGRAM_API_KEY with signup links and free tier notes.

providers.pollinations: Free, no key. Current default. Lower quality. Zero setup.
providers.flux-schnell-replicate: Replicate FLUX Schnell. ~$0.003/image. $5 free credit on signup. Fastest FLUX. Best free starting point.
providers.flux-dev-replicate: Replicate FLUX Dev. ~$0.025/image. Higher quality than Schnell. Use for hero/showcase renders.
providers.ideogram: Ideogram v2. Free tier with monthly credits. Strong on stylized/cinematic. Good for documentary + history templates.

image_upgrade_plan.cost_to_start: $0 — Replicate $5 free credit + Ideogram free tier covers hundreds of test renders
